jobs.title: Senior Next.js Developer
jobs.qualifications: B.Tech in CSE, MCA, or equivalent technical degree
jobs.description: We are seeking a Senior Next.js Developer to join our core development team. You will lead the engineering of highly interactive, blazing-fast web applications, e-commerce storefronts, and customized headless dashboards for our international clients.
requirements: Strong experience with React, Next.js (App Router), and TypeScript.
Proficiency in state management, TailwindCSS, and custom responsive animations.
Experience optimizing Next.js Core Web Vitals and SSR/SSG caching strategies.
Excellent communication and team leadership capabilities.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobs.qualifications: MBA in Marketing, Bachelor's in Business, or related degree
jobs.description: Join our marketing powerhouse as a Lead Strategist! You will design, execute, and monitor high-converting Google Ads (PPC), Facebook Blueprint marketing funnels, and organic search engine growth campaigns for top-tier Indian and global brands.
requirements: Proven experience managing monthly ad spends of 5L+ INR.
Certified in Google Ads Search/Display and Facebook Blueprint.
Deep expertise in Google Analytics (GA4), heatmaps, and landing page conversions.
Stellar writing skills for copywriting and marketing copy.

blogs.content:
DIGITAL MARKETING BLOG

Ananya Hi Digital Marketing Services

Your Trusted AI-Powered Growth Partner in Hyderabad

Are you a business owner in Hyderabad struggling to get more customers online? You are not alone. Every day, hundreds of local businesses miss out on leads and sales simply because their digital presence is weak. That is where Ananya Hi Digital Marketing Services steps in. We use the power of AI to grow your brand, bring in real leads, and help your business stand out in a crowded market.

We are based in Hyderabad and we understand the local market better than anyone. Whether you are a startup, a small business, or an established brand, our smart AI-driven strategies are built to deliver results that actually matter to you.

1. AI Marketing Analysis

Before spending even one rupee on ads, you need to know what is working and what is not. Our AI marketing analysis digs deep into your data, your competitors, and your audience. We find out exactly where your customers are and what they are looking for. This is how smart businesses make smart decisions. No more guessing, no more wasting money on the wrong things.

2. AI Social Media Optimization & Lead Generation

Social media is where your customers spend most of their time. But posting randomly does not bring results. Our best social media optimization services use AI to find the right content, the right time to post, and the right audience to target. On top of that, we run best lead generation services that turn your social followers into real paying customers. Every like, every comment, every click — we make it count.

3. AI Google Ads Optimization & Setup

Google is where people search when they need something right now. If your business is not showing up, you are losing customers to your competitors. Our team sets up and optimizes your Google Ads using AI tools that constantly improve your campaigns. We make sure every rupee you spend brings in the best possible return. We also combine this with the best SEO services so your business ranks higher even without paid ads over time.

4. AI Meta Ads Optimization

Facebook and Instagram ads are powerful, but only when done right. Our AI Meta Ads service targets the exact people who are most likely to buy from you. We test multiple ad versions at once and our AI picks the winners automatically. This means faster results and lower costs for you. If you are looking for the best X ads services near me in Hyderabad, we also manage X (Twitter) ad campaigns that build brand awareness and bring direct traffic to your website.

5. Best Website Development Services in Hyderabad

Your website is your online office. It should look professional, load fast, and turn visitors into customers. Our best website development services are designed keeping your business goals in mind. We build clean, mobile-friendly websites that not only look great but are also built for SEO from day one. A good website combined with smart digital marketing is a powerful combination.

Why Choose Ananya Hi?

We are a Hyderabad-based team that truly understands local businesses

We use AI tools to make your marketing smarter and cheaper

Transparent reporting so you always know where your money is going

Dedicated support — we are always just a call away

Proven results across multiple industries in Hyderabad



Ready to Grow Your Business in Hyderabad?

Stop waiting and start growing. Contact Ananya Hi Digital Marketing Services today and let us build a strategy that actually works for your business. Whether you need leads, more website traffic, better ads, or a complete digital makeover — we have got you covered.

Ananya Hi Digital Marketing Services | Hyderabad  |  AI-Powered Growth for Your Business
